ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members working on the project */,
  "lead_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead user responsible for the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or stakeholder */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iterations" (
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each iteration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the iteration belongs to */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the iteration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the iteration started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the iteration ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the iteration (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model used in the iteration (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON string containing hyperparameters used in the iteration */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "test_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the test data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the iteration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_iterations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration the performance record belongs to */,
  "recall_of_C" REAL /* Recall of class C */,
  "mean_relative_error_of_A" REAL /* Mean relative error of class A */,
  "invocation_truly" REAL /* Proportion of true invocations */,
  "mean_relative_error_of_A_with_C" REAL /* Mean relative error of class A with class C */,
  "accuracy_of_C" REAL /* Accuracy of class C */,
  "invocation_of_C" REAL /* Proportion of invocations for class C */,
  "precision_of_C" REAL /* Precision of class C */,
  "f1_score_of_C" REAL /* F1 score of class C */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* JSON string representing the confusion matrix */,
  "roc_auc_score" REAL /* ROC AUC score */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model (in seconds) */,
  "inference_time" REAL /* Average time taken for inference (in seconds) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the performance metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the iteration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project or iteration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project or iteration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "iteration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the iteration the model version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model file */,
  "model_size" REAL /* Size of the model file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was uploaded */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_framework" TEXT /* Framework used to build the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* JSON string containing dependencies required to run the model */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* JSON string containing performance metrics for the model version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_iteration_id FOREIGN KEY ("iteration_id") REFERENCES iterations ("iteration_id")
)
